title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at GKB Opticals International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at GKB Opticals International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at GKB Opticals International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About GKB Opticals International Enterprises:
GKB Opticals International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals International Enterprises!
